query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, questionText, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750004, 'What does the Greek word "hermēneuō" (ἑρμηνεύω) mean?', 'multiple_choice', '["To preach","To interpret or translate","To memorize","To prophesy"]', 'To interpret or translate', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'According to E.D. Hirsch, who determines the meaning of a text?', 'multiple_choice', '["The reader","The community","The author","The translator"]', 'The author', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'What is the primary goal of biblical interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["To find personal application","To understand the author''s intended meaning","To discover hidden codes","To support theological positions"]', 'To understand the author''s intended meaning', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'What is "eisegesis"?', 'multiple_choice', '["Reading meaning out of the text","Reading meaning into the text","Comparing Scripture with Scripture","Historical analysis"]', 'Reading meaning into the text', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'According to 1 Corinthians 2:12-14, what role does the Holy Spirit play in interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["He bypasses the need for study","He provides illumination","He dictates the interpretation","He replaces human effort"]', 'He provides illumination', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'What is "proof-texting"?', 'multiple_choice', '["Using verses out of context","Proving the Bible is true","Testing interpretations","Citing multiple passages"]', 'Using verses out of context', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'Biblical hermeneutics is described as both a science and an art. What does the "science" aspect refer to?', 'multiple_choice', '["Laboratory experiments","Established principles and methods","Mathematical formulas","Scientific theories"]', 'Established principles and methods', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'What danger does allegorizing present in interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["It ignores the literal meaning","It finds hidden meanings not intended by the author","It overemphasizes historical context","Both A and B"]', 'Both A and B', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'According to 2 Timothy 2:15, what should a worker of God''s Word do?', 'multiple_choice', '["Memorize the entire Bible","Rightly handle the word of truth","Preach without preparation","Follow tradition"]', 'Rightly handle the word of truth', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'What is the relationship between illumination and careful study?', 'multiple_choice', '["Illumination replaces study","Study replaces illumination","Illumination does not bypass the need for study","They are unrelated"]', 'Illumination does not bypass the need for study', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750004, 'Explain in your own words why proper biblical interpretation matters for Christian ministry and daily life.', 'short_answer', NULL, NULL, 11, NOW(), NOW());
